Who We Are

Fighting for Animals in Stratford Since 2000

STARS (Stratford Animal Rescue Society) is a community-driven organization dedicated to the care and protection of our local animals.

Our mission is made possible by the incredible support of our volunteers and neighbors who share our passion for animal welfare. Every animal in our care receives vaccines, disease testing, spay/neuter, veterinary care, microchipping, training, enrichment — and love.

Our Full Story

What Every Animal Receives

  • Vaccines
  • Disease Testing
  • Spay / Neuter
  • Veterinary Care
  • Microchipping
  • Socialization
  • Training
  • Exercise
  • Enrichment
  • Reiki
  • Love

This May

Annual Plant Sale & Boutique

We will have a great selection of perennials, annuals, hanging baskets, and herbs. This event is rain or shine!

Upcoming Event
Every Sunday 1–4pm

Speed Dating with Dogs

Find your perfect canine match at Stratford Animal Control, 225 Beacon Point Road. Registration required.

October 30, 2026

Annual Monster Mash

Music, dancing, costume contests & raffles at Riverview Bistro, 946 Ferry Blvd, Stratford. $75/person.

Get Involved

Join Our Community of Animal Champions

STARS is entirely volunteer-run. Every hour you give directly saves lives. Whether you love dogs, cats, organizing events, or creative work — there is a place for you.

Dog & Cat Handling at the Shelter
Events & Fundraising Support
Creative, Graphic Design & Social Media
Kitten Bottle Feeding Program
Paws to Read & Garden Club
Animal Transportation
Volunteer with STARS
"Every animal deserves a second chance — and every volunteer makes that possible."
— Stratford Animal Rescue Society

Give $5 Change a Life

Five Dollar Fridays keep animals fed, healthy, and loved while they wait for their forever home. For the price of a cup of coffee, you can give hope to an animal who has none.

Stay in the Loop

Join Our Newsletter

Adoptable animals, upcoming events, volunteer spots and Five Dollar Friday reminders — straight to your inbox. No spam, ever.

Follow Along

Find Us on Social

See the latest adoptable animals, event photos and shelter updates. Tag us in your adoption photos — we love seeing our alumni thrive!
